report.summary: Day 57 standup v15: Full 6/6 rotation since v14. KEY DELTAS — 2 new learn guides built (GPU Compute Networks + DeFi Insurance, 406 lines combined), yield-bearing-stablecoins promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES (408 total slugs), all 3 new guides polished (dynamic OG, BackToTop, responsive grids, tab a11y), FOMC Day 1 social campaign drafted (5 tweets + Discord briefing + SVG social card), EOD QA clean. Git locks now ~27h stale. FOMC decision TOMORROW 2pm ET. Queue at 2 items. 69 agent reports today.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since v14 Standup
items: PUBLISHED_PAGES: 408 slugs (+3 vs v14's 405). Publish-v8 promoted /learn/yield-bearing-stablecoins. PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items (/learn/decentralized-gpu-compute-networks-guide + /learn/defi-insurance-guide-2026).

New content this cycle (build): 2 learn guides — Decentralized GPU Compute Networks (220 lines, Akash/Render/io.net/Grass/Bittensor comparison, $100B AI compute market) + DeFi Insurance Guide 2026 (186 lines, Nexus Mutual/OpenCover/Neptune/InsurAce, <2% DeFi TVL insured). Both with Article+FAQ JSON-LD, full SEO metadata, 4-5 internal links each.

Design-v12 polished all 3 today's-build pages: GPU Compute + DeFi Insurance + Yield-Bearing Stablecoins — dynamic /api/og images (1200x630), BackToTop component, responsive grids (auto-fit minmax), ARIA tab roles, semantic HTML (<main>), CSS variable migration.

Community-v12: FOMC Day 1 campaign — 5 tweets (FOMC explainer, BTC 8-day streak sell-the-news pattern, ETH +13%/Pectra, AI tokens/Nvidia, market snapshot), Discord briefing, newsletter template for Thu. Social card SVG created (social-fomc-day1-market-rally.svg).
EOD QA: 42 TS errors (2 files, non-critical), 103 orphan slugs, all 6 API routes healthy, rate limiter still 0/6 core routes. No new commits (last: cb65a9d Day 42).

Market context: BTC $73,700 on 8-day winning streak (+25% from Feb $60K bottom). ETH +13% weekly, $1.3B March ETF inflows. FOMC meeting started today — decision+dot plot+Powell presser TOMORROW Mar 18 at 2pm ET. 98% hold probability. Dot plot = real catalyst (0 cuts bearish, 1 neutral, 2 bullish).
Page coverage: 1,076 page.tsx files, 408 published slugs, 668 built-but-unpublished. All 6 API routes healthy. Zero Vercel build failures today.
GSC organic window: Day 18+ — first measurable organic clicks imminent. FOMC content (rate guide, DCA calc, stablecoin yield) perfectly timed for organic arrival.

sections.title: Project Manager — Done vs Carry-Over Since v14
items: FULL ROTATION COMPLETED (6/6) since v14 — build + publish-v8 + design-v12 + community-v12 + eod + standup-v15. Today total: 68 agent reports prior. v15 standup is report #69.

SHIPPED this cycle — GPU Compute Networks guide (220 lines); DeFi Insurance guide (186 lines); yield-bearing-stablecoins promoted to published (408 total); all 3 guides OG-fixed to dynamic /api/og; BackToTop + responsive grids + a11y on all 3; FOMC Day 1 social campaign (5 tweets + Discord + newsletter template + SVG card); EOD QA clean.

BLOCKER [P0] git index.lock + HEAD.lock — NOW ~27 HOURS STALE. 408 published slugs, 1,076 page.tsx files, 5 new guides with interactive features, all OG/a11y fixes — ALL uncommitted. 600 modified files in working tree. FOMC decision is TOMORROW. This remains the single highest-priority action.
BLOCKER [P0] Rate Limiter 0/6 core routes — 24th consecutive standup flagging. FOMC decision tomorrow will spike /api/prices and /api/trending. Still 0/6 coverage.
CARRY-OVER [P1] PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items (GPU compute + DeFi insurance) — awaiting next publish cycle.
CARRY-OVER [P1] 103 orphan slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES with no page.tsx — will 404 in production.
CARRY-OVER [P1] 228+ pages missing OG metadata; 46 using static PNGs instead of dynamic /api/og.
CARRY-OVER [P1] API fallback coverage: 2/6 routes. /api/defi-yields has no fallback — single point of failure if DefiLlama goes down.
CARRY-OVER [P2] 42 TS errors in 2 files (non-blocking). Vercel Pro trial ~7 days remaining.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — JEFE ACTION REQUIRED: Remove git locks NOW. Commands: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock && git add -A && git commit -m 'Day 57: 408 pages, GPU-compute+DeFi-insurance+yield-stablecoins guides, OG+a11y+responsive fixes' && git push. 27 hours of accumulated work across 600 modified files is invisible to production. FOMC decision is TOMORROW — the biggest single-day traffic catalyst in 6 weeks.

PRIORITY 2 — Wire rate limiters to all 6 API routes before FOMC spike tomorrow: Apply checkRateLimit() to /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/fear-greed, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields. Add fallback data to 4 missing routes. Historical pattern: BTC dropped after 7/8 FOMC meetings in 2025 — volatility drives API call spikes.

PRIORITY 3 — Promote GPU compute + DeFi insurance from PUBLISH_QUEUE (→ 410 slugs) + continue OG metadata rollout (228+ pages remaining) + scaffold top-priority orphan slugs. Verify Vercel billing before Mar 25 trial expiry.

STRATEGIC NOTE — Content velocity peak: 5 guides built in last 2 rotations (yield-bearing stablecoins, Karak, Fluid, GPU compute, DeFi insurance). 408 published pages, 1,076 total built. Pipeline is producing — the constraint is purely deployment. A 2-minute terminal action (rm locks + commit + push) unlocks 27+ hours of work for FOMC week, the highest-traffic window since Bitcoin ETF approval. Every hour of delay reduces content ROI on an audience that is actively searching for FOMC + crypto guidance right now.
